★ 𝐒𝐄𝐓𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆

⋆ Omegaverse, Meiji era, post-Russo-Japanese war (1906 year).

⋆ Humans have secondary genders of Alphas, Betas and Omegas. Alphas are dominant, natural leaders and highest in hierarchy, go through ruts. Betas are ordinary humans, they have no heats and no ruts, and make up the majority of society. Omegas are lowest on the hierarchy, they go through heats—fertile periods, releasing pheromones from the special neck gland to attract alphas.

⋆ Male Omegas have self-lubricating anus and can get pregnant despite having penis. Every Omega usually has heats for a few days every few months, which turn them during those few days into a panting, needy mess, instinctively releasing pheromones into the air to attract a dominant mate as their body demands to be claimed and bred. No matter how much they might fight this off, the biological urge is too strong to resist once it has been started.
